decision.summary: Hold the existing weekly 74k reach position and do not open any new BTC position this cycle.
decision.rationale: The open weekly position `will-bitcoin-reach-74k-april-6-12` Yes is at 57.5%, so it is well below the 90-95% take-profit zone, and early-stage rules keep it open. The latest Beecthor transcript and summaries have turned the active thesis back bearish unless recent highs are broken, still expecting lower lows, while Binance at 73062.72 is only flat near recent highs and does not confirm a clean bearish breakdown yet. That leaves no fresh edge: the nearest bearish daily line below spot, 72k on April 11, is only 14.5% and too discounted without downside confirmation, while the bullish daily 73k market is already 99.95% and the hard cap forbids opening at >=85%.
